KOVANMOD-NAIL_POWER.description: When triggered deal damage equal to the amount on the target, and remove all the stacks. Each turn, Nails is reduced by 1.
KOVANMOD-NAIL_POWER.smartDescription: When triggered deal damage equal to the amount on the target, and remove all the stacks. Each turn, Nails is reduced by 1.
KOVANMOD-NAIL_POWER.title: Nail
KOVANMOD-BRAMBLE_VEST_POWER.description: Whenever you are attacked this turn, apply X Nails to the attacker.
KOVANMOD-BRAMBLE_VEST_POWER.smartDescrip: Whenever you are attacked this turn, apply X Nails to the attacker.
KOVANMOD-BRAMBLE_VEST_POWER.title: Bramble Vest
KOVANMOD-DETERMINATION_POWER.description: Whenever you give Strength to an enemy you gain Strength.
KOVANMOD-DETERMINATION_POWER.smartDescri: Whenever you give Strength to an enemy you gain Strength.
KOVANMOD-DETERMINATION_POWER.title: Determination
KOVANMOD-RECYCLE_POWER.description: The first Junk you play each turn is played an extra time.
KOVANMOD-RECYCLE_POWER.smartDescription: The first Junk you play each turn is played an extra time.
KOVANMOD-RECYCLE_POWER.title: Recycle
